recommendations.title: Abigail

recommendations.title: A Town Called Panic
recommendations.overview: Cowboy and Indian's only wish was to come up with a brilliant idea for Mr Horse's birthday, but when their plan ends up in utter disaster, they'll need to travel the world and back to make things right again.

recommendations.title: To Chiara
recommendations.overview: The Guerrasio family and friends gather to celebrate Claudio and Carmela’s oldest daughter’s 18th birthday. There is a healthy rivalry between the birthday girl and her 15-year-old sister Chiara as they compete on the dancefloor. It is a happy occasi

recommendations.title: Wish Upon a Star
recommendations.overview: A younger sister wishes to switch places with her popular older sister and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

recommendations.title: My Best Friend's Exorcism
recommendations.overview: The year is 1988. Abby and Gretchen have been best friends since fourth grade. After an evening of skinny-dipping goes disastrously wrong, Gretchen begins to act…different, which leads Abby to suspect her best friend may be possessed by a demon. With

recommendations.title: Barbie & Chelsea: The Lost Birthday
recommendations.overview: Barbie, Chelsea and their family go on a cruise ship for Chelsea's birthday. But when they cross the international date line skipping her birthday, Chelsea escapes to the jungle island to find a fabled wish and get her birthday back.

recommendations.title: Freaky Friday
recommendations.overview: School girl Annabel is hassled by her mother, and Mrs. Andrews is annoyed with her daughter, Annabel. They both think that the other has an easy life. On a normal Friday morning, both complain about each other and wish they could have the easy life o

recommendations.title: Richie Rich's Christmas Wish
recommendations.overview: After getting blamed for spoiling Christmas, the richest kid in the world wishes he'd never been born. Unfortunately, a wishing machine, invented by professor Keenbean, picked up the wish and made it come true. Now Richie finds himself in a parallel

recommendations.title: Three Wishes for Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Popelka, a resourceful and independent young girl, is a servant in her stepmother's house and confides in her closest friend the owl. When she comes across three magical acorns, she's granted a single wish for each one of them.

recommendations.title: The Barbie Diaries
recommendations.overview: Barbie is disheartened when Todd breaks her heart and goes back to his former girlfriend. But things change when she comes across a diary, which makes her wishes come true.
